Who We Serve

For homes, offices, and everything in between.

We work with homeowners, property managers, business owners, office managers, churches, and retail operators. If you need something fixed, cleaned, or installed — we're your team.

We offer ongoing maintenance programs, one-time service calls, and project-based work. Whatever you need, we make the process simple from start to finish.

Homeowners Property Managers HOAs Offices Retail Churches Airbnb Hosts Hotels & Hospitality Restaurants & Cafés Fitness Centers Salons & Spas Apartments & Multi-Family Real Estate Agents
Who We Are

Uncover our story

We’re a brother-sister team building a business rooted in faith, family, and the values we grew up with in our Polish home: put God first, work hard, keep your word, and treat people with honesty and respect. Those principles became the foundation of our business and continue to guide everything we do. What began with hands-on experience has grown into a commitment to providing dependable, high-quality service you can trust. Click below to learn more about our story!

Services

Maintenance. Cleaning. Installations.

We offer a range of property maintenance, cleaning, and installation services for homes and businesses. Whether it's a small fix or a larger project, we focus on doing quality work, communicating clearly, and making the process as smooth as possible from start to finish.

01

Maintenance & Repairs

From quick fixes to recurring maintenance programs, we handle the things that keep your property running smoothly — so you don't have to.

General Handyman Services

03

Cleaning Services

Professional cleaning for offices, rental properties, churches, gyms, and commercial facilities. We show up on time, do the work right, and leave every space spotless.

Commercial clients only.

Office Cleaning

For Businesses

Commercial & Facility Services

We work with offices, retail locations, property managers, and multi-site operators across the Phoenix metro. All three of our service pillars are available for commercial clients — with options for ongoing maintenance programs, multi-location support, facility inspections, and more.

About

Who we are

Our Story

Built by a brother and sister with a shared commitment to doing things the right way.

STEPIEN LLC is a family-owned property services company built by a brother and sister with a shared commitment to doing things the right way.

With backgrounds in hands-on maintenance, installation, operations, and project management, we've seen firsthand how often customers are left dealing with poor communication, rushed work, and unreliable service. We knew there was a better way to serve people—so we built one.

Our work is rooted in the values we were raised with. As a Polish, family-run business, we take pride in our work, we stand behind what we do, and we genuinely care about the people we serve. Those principles shape how we approach every project, from the smallest repair to larger installations.

Our approach is simple: show up, communicate clearly, pay attention to the details, and treat every home or business like our own. We believe that trust is earned through consistency, and that everything we build should reflect our values.

Today, we support homeowners and businesses across the Greater Phoenix Area with reliable maintenance, repairs, installation, and cleaning services—always with a focus on doing things the right way.

Thank you for taking the time to learn our story. We can’t wait to meet you and serve you.

With gratitude,

Lidia & Jakub

"As each one has received a gift, use it to serve one another as good stewards of God's varied grace."
1 Peter 4:10 · NABRE
